title: Polestar Automotive PSNY FY2026 Earnings Performance
text: Polestar Automotive PSNY reported full year 2026 earnings results showing mixed performance metrics. EPS came in at negative $0.85, beating estimate of negative $13.42 by 93.67%. Revenue reached $3.06 billion, exceeding estimate of $2.98 billion by 2.51%. Over the last 4 quarters, Polestar Automotive averaged an EPS surprise of 2.02% and revenue surprise of 3.18%. Polestar remains unprofitable with net profit for twelve months ending December 31, 2025 of negative $2.36 billion. For fiscal year 2025, company experienced 15% improvement in earnings year-over-year, though growth within negative territory. Key metrics included revenue of $3.1 billion, profit margin of negative 77.1%, EBITDA of negative $1.92 billion, and return on assets of negative 59%. Among automotive stocks tracked, PSNY has largest losses, significantly worse than competitors like Lucid Motors and Lordstown Motors.
